title: Aurora, 61401, Freesia Pig 7In, Soft Toy, Pink
features: From Aurora's range of Cuddle Pals
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable super soft Freesia Pig Pig cuddly toy
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: Cuddle Pals is Aurora World’s cutest and cuddliest range of collectable animals. Introducing our gorgeous pink Pig named Freesia. Made using the softest materials, you will not believe until you touch her, how soft the material is. Freesia is the perfect present for birthdays, spring time, Easter and just because. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
